name: Pipazethate
pharmacodynamics: Antitussive agents act centrally on the medullary cough center.

interactions.name: Mecamylamine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Pipazethate is combined with Mecamylamine.

interactions.name: Dexketoprofen
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Dexketoprofen is combined with Pipazethate.
